extracted_information: VirtualBudz BudBot is an AI-powered cannabis ecommerce chatbot and virtual budtender designed for dispensaries to increase sales, reduce cart abandonment, and provide 24/7 customer support. It leverages advanced AI technologies for product discovery, compliance, and personalized shopping experiences.

specifications.compliance: Fully compliant for all state regulations, built-in compliance monitoring, automated compliance checking and reporting, avoids medical claims, age-inappropriate content, and state-specific violations.
specifications.functionality_scope: Full sales assistant, multi agent functionality, unlimited usage.

features.name: AI Budtender Cannabis Recommendations
features.description: AI-powered product recommendations based on effects, terpenes, and customer preferences, guiding customers to products they'll actually buy.

features.name: Advanced Cannabis Strain Finder AI Technology
features.description: Specialized AI for discovering cannabis strains.

features.name: Natural Language Processing (NLP)
features.description: Understands customer intent and preferences in natural conversation.

features.name: Cannabis Voice AI
features.description: Voice-enabled product discovery for hands-free shopping experience.

features.name: Cannabis Compliance AI
features.description: Built-in compliance monitoring for all state regulations and requirements.

features.name: Cart Sensors with Dynamic Discounts
features.description: Monitors cart activity and provides personalized messages and strategic discounts for abandoned carts.

features.name: Personalized Login Memories
features.description: Remembers customer preferences and past interactions for personalized shopping.

features.name: Automated Upsell Logic
features.description: Identifies cross-selling opportunities (e.g., cartridges with batteries, flower with papers) to increase average order value.

features.name: 24/7 Cannabis Customer Support
features.description: Handles routine inquiries, allowing staff to focus on high-value consultations.

features.name: Product Discovery (Beta)
features.description: AI-powered product recommendations based on effects, terpenes, and customer preferences.

features.name: Cannabis Analytics (Beta)
features.description: Advanced analytics tailored for cannabis retail metrics and compliance reporting.

features.name: Compliance Assistant (Beta)
features.description: Automated compliance checking and reporting for cannabis regulations.

geographical_data.reach: Across 100+ dispensaries nationwide (USA, implied by state regulations focus)
